title: Apparatus and method for centralized control of vehicles
abstract: An apparatus and method for centralized control of a vehicle. The apparatus includes: a processing circuitry; and a memory, the memory containing instructions that, when executed by the processing circuitry, configure the apparatus to: establish control of at least one vehicle, wherein establishing the control further comprises determining a set of instructions for controlling each vehicle; generate a mission plan for a first vehicle of the at least one vehicle based on a request from a node when the request is valid, wherein the request indicates at least a first location and a second location; send, to the first vehicle, control instructions for navigating to the first location based on the mission plan; and send, to the first vehicle, control instructions for navigating from the first location to the second location based on the mission plan, when the vehicle is at the first location.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1 . An apparatus for centralized control of a vehicle, comprising: a processing circuitry; and a memory, the memory containing instructions that, when executed by the processing circuitry, configure the apparatus to: establish control of at least one vehicle, wherein establishing the control further comprises determining a set of instructions for controlling each vehicle, wherein the apparatus is configured to control each vehicle based on the respective set of instructions; generate a mission plan for a first vehicle of the at least one vehicle based on a request from a node when the request is valid, wherein the request indicates at least a first location and a second location; send, to the first vehicle, control instructions for navigating to the first location based on the mission plan; and send, to the first vehicle, control instructions for navigating from the first location to the second location based on the mission plan, when the vehicle is at the first location. 2. The apparatus of claim 1 , wherein the request is valid when the node is authorized. 3. The apparatus of claim 1 , wherein the apparatus is further configured to: determine, for the node, a subset of the set of instructions for controlling the vehicle, wherein the request is valid when the subset of instructions for the node includes the control instructions for navigating to the first location and the control instructions for navigating from the first location to the second location. 4. The apparatus of claim 1 , wherein the apparatus is further configured to: select the first vehicle to execute the mission plan. 5. The apparatus of claim 4, wherein the first vehicle is selected based on the mission plan and at least one of: a geographical location of each of the at least one vehicle, an availability of each of the at least one vehicle, a capability of each of the at least one vehicle and an amount of fuel of each of the at least one vehicle, an amount of power of each of the at least one vehicle. 6. The apparatus of claim 1 , wherein the control instructions for navigating to the first location further include instructions for accepting a payload when the vehicle is at the first location. 7. The apparatus of claim 1 , wherein the control instructions for navigating from the first location to the second location further include instructions for releasing a payload when the vehicle is at the second location. 8. The apparatus of claim 1 , wherein the control is established via a vehicle system of the vehicle, wherein the established control is exclusive control, wherein the vehicle system is configured to execute only instructions from the apparatus. 9. The apparatus of claim 1 , wherein the node is a user device, wherein the first location and the second location are based on user inputs from the user device. 10. A non-transitory computer readable medium having stored thereon instructions for causing a processing circuitry to perform a process, the process comprising: establishing control of at least one vehicle, wherein establishing the control further comprises determining a set of instructions for controlling each vehicle, wherein the apparatus is configured to control each vehicle based on the respective set of instructions; generating a mission plan for a first vehicle of the at least one vehicle based on a request from a node when the request is valid, wherein the request indicates at least a first location and a second location; sending, to the first vehicle, control instructions for navigating to the first location based on the mission plan; and 

 sending, to the first vehicle, control instructions for navigating from the first location to the second location based on the mission plan, when the vehicle is at the first location. 1 1 . A method for centralized control of a vehicle, comprising: establishing control of at least one vehicle, wherein establishing the control further comprises determining a set of instructions for controlling each vehicle, wherein the apparatus is configured to control each vehicle based on the respective set of instructions; generating a mission plan for a first vehicle of the at least one vehicle based on a request from a node when the request is valid, wherein the request indicates at least a first location and a second location; sending, to the first vehicle, control instructions for navigating to the first location based on the mission plan; and sending, to the first vehicle, control instructions for navigating from the first location to the second location based on the mission plan, when the vehicle is at the first location. 12. The method of claim 1 1 , wherein the request is valid when the node is authorized. 13. The method of claim 1 1 , further comprising: determining, for the node, a subset of the set of instructions for controlling the vehicle, wherein the request is valid when the subset of instructions for the node includes the control instructions for navigating to the first location and the control instructions for navigating from the first location to the second location. 14. The method of claim 1 1 , further comprising: selecting the first vehicle to execute the mission plan. 15. The method of claim 14, wherein the first vehicle is selected based on the mission plan and at least one of: a geographical location of each of the at least one vehicle, an availability of each of the at least one vehicle, a capability of each of the at least one 

 vehicle and an amount of fuel of each of the at least one vehicle, an amount of power of each of the at least one vehicle. 16. The method of claim 1 1 , wherein the control instructions for navigating to the first location further include instructions for accepting a payload when the vehicle is at the first location. 17. The method of claim 1 1 , wherein the control instructions for navigating from the first location to the second location further include instructions for releasing a payload when the vehicle is at the second location. 18. The method of claim 1 1 , wherein the control is established via a vehicle system of the vehicle, wherein the established control is exclusive control, wherein the vehicle system is configured to execute only instructions from the apparatus. 19. The method of claim 1 1 , wherein the node is a user device, wherein the first location and the second location are based on user inputs from the user device.
